  • Changelog

Package index

Public frontdoor API

ds.vert.align() ds.vert.is_aligned() ds.vert.desc() ds.vert.cor() ds.vert.pca() ds.vert.chisq() ds.vert.fisher() ds.vert.chisq_cross() ds.vert.glm() ds.vert.cox() ds.vert.coxph() ds.vert.nb() ds.vert.multinom() ds.vert.ordinal() ds.vert.lmm() ds.vert.gee() ds.vert.glmm() ds.vert.ipw() ds.vert.mi() ds.vert.lasso() ds.vert.lasso_iter() ds.vert.lasso_proximal() ds.vert.lasso_1step() ds.vert.lasso_cv() ds.vert.lr() ds.vert.confint() ds.vert.wald() ds.vert.contrast()
Public ds.vert.* API aliases

PSI alignment and identity

ds.psiAlign()
ECDH-PSI Record Alignment (Blind Relay)
ds.isPsiAligned()
Check whether a data symbol is already PSI-aligned on every server
ds.getIdentityPks()
Query Server Identity Public Keys

Compatibility backends

ds.vertDesc()
Federated descriptive statistics with approximate quantiles
ds.vertCor()
Ring63 Privacy-Preserving Correlation for Vertically Partitioned Data
ds.vertPCA()
Principal Component Analysis for Vertically Partitioned Data
ds.vertChisq()
Federated chi-square test on a 2-way contingency table
ds.vertChisqCross()
Cross-server chi-square (one-hot + Beaver cross-products)
ds.vertFisher()
Federated Fisher exact test (same-server case)
ds.vertGLM()
Generalized Linear Model for Vertically Partitioned Data
ds.vertCox()
Federated Cox proportional-hazards regression
ds.vertCoxProfileNonDisclosive()
Cox proportional hazards via non-disclosive Breslow profile Newton
ds.vertCoxDiscreteNonDisclosive()
Cox discrete-time pooled-logistic – non-disclosive option B (#D')
ds.vertNBFullRegTheta()
Federated NB regression with full-regression theta refinement
ds.vertMultinom()
Federated multinomial logistic regression
ds.vertMultinomJoint()
Federated joint-softmax multinomial logistic regression
ds.vertMultinomJointNewton()
Federated joint-softmax multinomial logistic regression via Ring127 MPC-orchestrated Newton iteration
ds.vertOrdinal()
Federated ordinal logistic regression
ds.vertOrdinalJointNewton()
Federated joint proportional-odds ordinal regression via Ring127 MPC-orchestrated Newton iteration
ds.vertLMM()
Federated linear mixed model with a single random intercept
ds.vertLMM.k3()
Federated linear mixed model via share-domain residual GLS (K>=3)
ds.vertGEE()
Federated generalised estimating equations
ds.vertGLMM()
Federated binomial GLMM-PQL
ds.vertIPW()
Federated inverse-probability-weighted GLM (two-stage)
ds.vertMI()
Federated multiple imputation with Rubin pooling
ds.vertLASSO()
Post-hoc soft-thresholded GLM coefficients (naive LASSO)
ds.vertLASSOIter()
Federated LASSO path from a non-disclosive GLM fit
ds.vertLASSOProximal()
Proper LASSO via client-side proximal gradient on normal equations
ds.vertLASSO1Step()
One-step LASSO via quadratic-surrogate proximal gradient
ds.vertLASSOCV()
Information-criterion lambda selection for one-step LASSO
ds.vertLR()
Likelihood-ratio test on two nested ds.vertGLM fits
ds.vertConfint()
Wald confidence intervals for ds.vertGLM coefficients
ds.vertWald()
Univariate Wald test for a single ds.vertGLM coefficient
ds.vertContrast()
Multi-coefficient Wald test via linear contrast K*beta

Helpers and S3 methods

k2-beaver-lbfgs-client
K=2 Beaver L-BFGS Pipeline
k3-ring63-dcf-loop
K>=3 Ring63 DCF + Beaver Gradient Loop
chunk-utils
Adaptive Chunking for DataSHIELD Transport
coef(<ds.glm>)
Coefficients Method for ds.glm Objects
print(<ds.cor>)
Print Method for ds.cor Objects
print(<ds.glm>)
Print Method for ds.glm Objects
print(<ds.pca>)
Print Method for ds.pca Objects
summary(<ds.glm>)
Summary Method for ds.glm Objects

On this page

dsVertClient
